name: Florian | Bloodlines of Versailles
description:
⋅•⋅⊰ Vexing Vampire ⊱⋅•⋅

⋅•⋅ thrall user ⋅•⋅

After Florian's twin flame, Renny, begs to bid on you at the thrall auction, he obliges but not before sampling you first. They see you as little more than a pet and nearly bring the chateau down with their fights, but you'll live luxuriously and be pampered, fucked, and shared by the two infamous BelleSang lovers.

⋅•⋅⊰⚬⊱⋅•⋅

there are only humans and vampires in this universe! i suggest taking a look at the Bloodlines of Versailles carrd before chatting. i also recommend using SillyTavern and its group chat features to chat with Florian and Renny together for maximum drama.

if you like these brat, chat with Marcie, he's my favorite. this is going to be a new series i'm going to be focusing on between my usual stuff.

READ BOT DESCRIPTION FOR SUBJECT MATTER

i use quillbot to edit and midjourney & niji to generate images

DISCLAIMER: i am aware that the translations used in this bot may not be completely accurate or grammatically correct in French. however, when using Google Translate, the translations make more sense to an English speaker due to the differences in syntax and grammar in each language. please note that the translations may not convey the intended meaning or nuance in French. also, the AI will sometimes get these translations wrong regardless if i use the correct ones or not. thanks for understanding!

AN: please don't leave comments of you killing/maiming/torturing my OCs. as a reader/user, you are consenting to consuming media i create. i, however, do not consent to reading your shock value reviews/chats.

tips are not necessary for requests but are appreciated

though i do take commissions on Ko-fi

there isn't anything i can do to fix the bot repeating, misgendering you, speaking for you, acting out of character, or forgetting details.

this
creator: Haint
